text.message: Yeah I couldn’t stop him from getting everything he wanted

and ive been solod for awhile

the port and the set of red?
its a good game just chill
but i will say the same
black in a good spot lol
White can I help you with road? And I play army?
Just trying to help, your loss
these are great trades for black too
we both know hes doing well lol
potential is all in this game

not sure why im taking these solos

i wish you be my friend

i need to know you dont have 3 vps
lol if you’re taking road, doesn’t make sense to solo last place

and you and i share every spot
